Taking place in New York on December 5, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, is conducting an inquiry into potential misconduct by specific officers and directors of Luna Innovations Incorporated (OTCMKTS:...). It is crucial for shareholders to act swiftly in such matters to protect their interests.

data.title: South Coast AQMD approves $220K for Coachella Valley street sweeping program, aiming to reduce dust emissions.
data.description: Diamond Bar, California - The South Coast Air Quality Management District (South Coast AQMD) has allocated $220,000 to the Coachella Valley Association of Governments (CVAG) to expand regional street projects. This investment aims to reduce dust emissions in the area.

data.title: Red River Bank and FHLB Dallas will award $1.2M grant for Senior Housing Development in LA. Total funding $12M in 25 years.
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, a celebration will be held to mark the awarding of a $1.2 million Affordable Housing Program (AHP) grant from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) to Gulf Coast Housing Partnership (GCHP) for the construction of Lotus Village at the Lake. This housing community is designed for older adults in need of affordable living options. The grant is part of a larger initiative where $12 million in funding has been distributed to various Louisiana communities. This marks a significant milestone in the 25-year collaboration between R... and the FHLB Dallas, aimed at supporting affordable housing initiatives in the region.

data.title: Red River Bank and FHLB Dallas award $952K to Alexandria Housing Authority, part of $12M funding to Louisiana communities.
data.description: In Alexandria, Louisiana, a ceremonial check presentation will take place at 1:00 p.m. on Monday, December 8, to celebrate the awarding of $952,050 to the Alexandria Housing Authority. This funding comes from the FHLB Dallas FORTIFIED Fund Rental Program. The event will mark the delivery of $12 million in funding to Louisiana communities as part of a 25-year partnership between Red River Bank and FHLB Dallas.

data.title: Red River Bank and FHLB Dallas award $120K grant to Lafayette nonprofit for homeowners impacted by disasters. $12M total distributed to Louisiana communities.
data.description: A $120,000 Disaster Rebuilding Assistance grant has been awarded to Divine Touch Community Development Center in Lafayette, Louisiana. This grant is part of a larger initiative in which Red River Bank and the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas have provided $12 million in funding to Louisiana communities over a 25-year partnership. This event is part of a celebration tour across multiple cities to mark the collaborative efforts in aiding homeowners with storm-damaged homes.

data.title: Constellation reached a resolution with DOJ for Calpine acquisition, finalizing requirements for completion.
data.description: In Baltimore, Constellation disclosed that it has come to an agreement with the U.S. Department of Justice regarding the stipulations needed to finalize the acquisition of Calpine. The resolution outlines the necessary conditions for the acquisition to proceed smoothly.

data.title: Tinsley brokers facilitate Carolina Neurology sale to Local Infusion in SC. Local Infusion expands with high-value deal.
data.description: Local Infusion embarks on significant growth in South Carolina with a notable acquisition, while Tinsley Medical Practice Brokers solidify their status as a top player in medical practice deals nationwide. The acquisition, valued at a substantial amount, signifies Local Infusion's entrance into the South Carolina market and underlines Tinsley Medical Practice Brokers' strategic expansion efforts. The transaction was finalized on December 5, 2025, in Austin, Texas.

data.title: University of Phoenix enhances community college alliance with tuition waiver for sixth course to aid transfer students nationwide, boosting access and affordability.
data.description: University of Phoenix has recently implemented a systemwide enhancement to their community college alliance program, aimed at improving affordability and accessibility for students looking to transfer from community colleges to their bachelor's programs. This upgrade, introduced nationwide on December 5, 2025, seeks to benefit a wide range of community college students pursuing higher education. The program is set to significantly lower the financial burden for students by reducing transfer costs by up to 25%, making higher education more attainable for aspiring students. The initiative covers a vast network of community colleges and is intended to facilitate a seamless transition for students intending to pursue a bachelor's degree at the University of Phoenix.

data.title: DIC Corp to showcase 3 innovative products at CES 2026 in US. Leading tech trade show.
data.description: Tokyo-based DIC Corporation is set to showcase prototypes of three groundbreaking products at CES 2026, a renowned technology trade show. This event serves as a global platform for innovative technology with participants from around the world. DIC Corporation's participation underscores its commitment to innovation and cutting-edge technology. CES 2026 is expected to attract a vast audience, including industry professionals, investors, and technology enthusiasts, highlighting the significance of this opportunity for DIC Corporation to present its latest creations.

data.title: HIROMI ASAI showcases modern menswear at Miami Art Week 2025, redefining Japanese kimono textiles, merging craft and culture.
data.description: In Miami on December 5, 2025, HIROMI ASAI showcased a unique approach to Japanese textile heritage at Miami Art Week, turning traditional kimono textiles into modern menswear pieces. This creative reinterpretation highlights the fusion of craft, culture, and contemporary design.

data.title: Parsons Corp CEO Carey Smith to speak at Raymond James Conference on Dec 9, 2025, at 10:40 a.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) based in Chantilly, Virginia, revealed that Carey Smith, the chair, president, and CEO, will be involved in a fireside chat Q&A session at the Raymond James TMT and Consumer Conference on December 9, 2025. The session is scheduled for 10:40 a.m. Eastern Time.

Germany fires back at Washington after the Trump administration’s new strategy slams Europe’s values. Berlin insists it can defend free expression and democracy on its own with no “outside advice” needed.

data.title: Bitcoin stabilizes at $90,000 as big investors exploit Ethereum drop. Corporate ETH purchases fell 81%, but top holders buy billions in Ether.
data.description: In the last three months, there has been an 81% decrease in corporate acquisitions of Ether. However, despite this decline, the largest corporate holders of ETH have managed to acquire billions of dollars' worth of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Elevance Health expands Virtual Assistant to aid in navigating healthcare, providing easy access to info and care for members.
data.description: Elevance Health has introduced an expansion of its Virtual Assistant service to enhance access for members. The digital tool aims to assist individuals in accessing information, understanding benefits, and confidently seeking care. The Virtual Assistant is accessible through the Sydney Health app and websites of Elevance Health–affiliated health plans. By utilizing conversational technology, it streamlines healthcare navigation and boosts engagement between members and their health plans.

data.title: Home Depot (NYSE: HD) faces pressure to show earnings improvement at upcoming investor day, with focus on 2026 guidance.
data.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE: HD) is preparing for its upcoming investor day with the goal of demonstrating a turnaround in earnings following a slowdown. Investors are eager to see new 2026 guidance and indications that the company's heavy investments in professional customers and resulting margin impacts are shifting positively. Analyst Christopher Horvers from JP Morgan anticipates the Investor Conference on December 12 in New York to be a crucial moment for the company. He believes this event could mark a shift away from the previous years of stagnant or decreasing performance. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
